projects.title: Echoes of the Savanna
projects.description: A large-scale mural series celebrating African wildlife and landscapes. Commissioned for the lobby of a Nairobi hotel, the project spans 40 meters and blends traditional motifs with contemporary illustration techniques.

projects.title: Fragments Exhibition
projects.description: A mixed-media gallery exhibition exploring identity and memory through broken ceramics, photography, and textile. Displayed across three rooms, the installation invites viewers to piece together fragmented narratives.

projects.title: Urban Pulse Brand Identity
projects.description: A full brand identity project for a streetwear label rooted in urban African culture. Deliverables included logo design, typography system, color palette, packaging, and a lookbook shot on location in Nairobi CBD.

projects.title: Light & Shadow Portrait Series
projects.description: A fine art photography series studying how natural light interacts with the human form across different times of day. Printed on archival paper and exhibited at a regional arts festival, the series features 20 large-format prints.

projects.title: Hadithi Animated Short
projects.description: A 6-minute hand-drawn animated short film retelling an East African folktale through a modern visual lens. The project involved a team of 8 illustrators and was officially selected for two international animation festivals.
